title: PBMC Isolation from Apheresis Collars with SepMate Tubes
author: Girija Goyal
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qpcdviw

steps.title: Cut cone from collar and place on 50mL conical tube
steps.instruction: Cut cone from collar and place on 50mL conical tube. Cut the top end to release blood and allow it to drip into the tube

steps.title: Dilute blood collected from apheresis collar...
steps.instruction: Dilute blood collected from apheresis collar with equal volume RPMI or PBS. Mix well.

steps.title: Use a 50ml SepMate tube and...
steps.instruction: Use a 50ml SepMate tube and follow manufacturer's directions for density centrifugation SepMate™-50 (IVD) 100 Tubes STEMCELL Technologies Inc. Catalog #85450 Lymphoprep™ 250 mL STEMCELL Technologies Inc. Catalog #7801

steps.title: Collect the white layer of cells...
steps.instruction: Collect the white layer of cells just above the plastic insert into a final volume of 20 ml of media or buffer. Limit the amount of Lymphoprep that is harvested. Mix well.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 300 g for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 300 g for 5 minutes. 00:05:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Aspirate media and resuspend cells in...
steps.instruction: Aspirate media and resuspend cells in 20 mL media/buffer depending on next steps. undetermined, Warm media

steps.title: Dilute 100x by adding 10ul cell...
steps.instruction: Dilute 100x by adding 10ul cell solutions to 890 ul media/buffer and 100ul of Trypan blue undetermined, Cell solution undetermined, Media/buffer undetermined, Trypan blue

steps.title: Count cells using a hemocytometer
steps.instruction: Count cells using a hemocytometer. Count the number of cells in each of the four quadrants. Use the following formula to find the total number of cells. Cells/ml = cells counted*dilution factor*104cells/4

steps.title: Cells can be kept in solution...
steps.instruction: Cells can be kept in solution in the refrigerator for up to two hours.
